examples: A night on the town may help to break the monotony of the week.
Only Canary Wharf and a few towers elsewhere break the monotony.
She watches television to relieve the monotony of everyday life.
"The Muse"'s one-joke monotony is relieved on occasion, usually by unexpected cameos from Brooks' film-world cronies.
Is she deserving of the award because she breaks the monotony of a red carpet parade?
